key.name: last-active-project
key.description: ID or name of the project to open on startup.

key.name: log-to-file
key.description: Whether to log to a file.

key.name: log-path
key.description: Path to the application log file. If empty, the default path is used.

key.name: messenger-dashboard-url
key.description: Base URL of the Symfony Messenger Monitor dashboard (e.g. https://example.com/admin/messenger).

key.name: preferred-browser
key.description: Command of the browser to use when opening URLs (e.g. firefox, chromium). Leave empty to use the system default.
